ksa_text: Skill in AI model development lifecycle governance, including documentation of design decisions, training methodologies, hyperparameter choices, and model versioning for risk management audits.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This skill KSA describes hands-on technical execution that falls below the expected seniority threshold for a Data and AI Transformation Lead (senior specialist tier). Execution-level work in Risk Management is not expected at this level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could real-world Data and AI Transformation Lead practitioners be expected to demonstrate this skill KSA in practice, despite the seniority gap?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NewVantage Partners CDO Survey, Wavestone CDAIO Report, and Gartner leadership effectiveness research confirm that senior specialist-tier roles delegate execution responsibilities to appropriate levels rather than owning them directly.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: seniority-based exclusion is consistent with external evidence on senior specialist-tier role expectations. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Seniority mismatch: this skill KSA is below the expected level for the Data and AI Transformation Lead (senior specialist tier). Consistently excluded.
